text:
```json
[
  "RTX 4060 was released on May 18, 2023 with an MSRP of $299.",
  "RTX 3060 was released on January 12, 2021 with an MSRP of $329.",
  "RTX 4060 has 8 GB GDDR6 memory while RTX 3060 has 12 GB GDDR6 memory.",
  "RTX 4060 has a TDP of 115 Watt compared to RTX 3060's 170 Watt.",
  "RTX 4060 uses Ada Lovelace architecture while RTX 3060 uses Ampere architecture.",
  "RTX 4060 has an aggregate benchmark score of 48.17, which is 15.4% higher than RTX 3060's 41.73.",
  "RTX 4060 offers 46% better value for money than RTX 3060.",
  "RTX 4060 has 3072 CUDA cores compared to RTX 3060's 3584 CUDA cores.",
  "RTX 4060 has a boost clock of 2460 MHz while RTX 3060 has a boost clock of 1777 MHz.",
  "RTX 4060 is manufactured on a 5 nm process while RTX 3060 is manufactured on an 8 nm process.",
  "RTX 4060 has 15.11 TFLOPS floating-point processing power compared to RTX 3060's 12.74 TFLOPS.",
  "RTX 4060 has 96 TMUs while RTX 3060 has 112 TMUs.",
  "Both GPUs have 48 ROPs.",
  "RTX 4060 uses PCIe 4.0 x8 interface while RTX 3060 uses PCIe 4.0 x16 interface.",
  "Both GPUs support DirectX 12 Ultimate, OpenGL 4.6, OpenCL 3.0, and Vulkan 1.3.",
  "RTX 4060 supports CUDA 8.9 while RTX 3060 supports CUDA 8.6.",
  "RTX 4060 has a 128-bit memory bus while RTX 3060 has a 192-bit memory bus.",
  "RTX 4060 has 272.0 GB/s memory bandwidth compared to RTX 3060's 360.0 GB/s.",
  "RTX 4060 is 17% faster than RTX 3060 at 1080p resolution.",
  "RTX 3060 is 3% faster than RTX 4060 at 1440p resolution.",
  "RTX 3060 is 11% faster than RTX 4060 at 4K resolution.",
  "RTX 4060 has 29% lower cost per frame than RTX 3060 at 1080p.",
  "RTX 4060 has 47.8% lower power consumption than RTX 3060.",
  "RTX 3060 has 50% more maximum VRAM than RTX 4060.",
  "The GeForce RTX 4060 is recommended as it beats the GeForce RTX 3060 in performance tests."
]
```
json_data: RTX 4060 was released on May 18, 2023 with an MSRP of $299.
RTX 3060 was released on January 12, 2021 with an MSRP of $329.
RTX 4060 has 8 GB GDDR6 memory while RTX 3060 has 12 GB GDDR6 memory.
RTX 4060 has a TDP of 115 Watt compared to RTX 3060's 170 Watt.
RTX 4060 uses Ada Lovelace architecture while RTX 3060 uses Ampere architecture.
RTX 4060 has an aggregate benchmark score of 48.17, which is 15.4% higher than RTX 3060's 41.73.
RTX 4060 offers 46% better value for money than RTX 3060.
RTX 4060 has 3072 CUDA cores compared to RTX 3060's 3584 CUDA cores.
RTX 4060 has a boost clock of 2460 MHz while RTX 3060 has a boost clock of 1777 MHz.
RTX 4060 is manufactured on a 5 nm process while RTX 3060 is manufactured on an 8 nm process.
RTX 4060 has 15.11 TFLOPS floating-point processing power compared to RTX 3060's 12.74 TFLOPS.
RTX 4060 has 96 TMUs while RTX 3060 has 112 TMUs.
Both GPUs have 48 ROPs.
RTX 4060 uses PCIe 4.0 x8 interface while RTX 3060 uses PCIe 4.0 x16 interface.
Both GPUs support DirectX 12 Ultimate, OpenGL 4.6, OpenCL 3.0, and Vulkan 1.3.
RTX 4060 supports CUDA 8.9 while RTX 3060 supports CUDA 8.6.
RTX 4060 has a 128-bit memory bus while RTX 3060 has a 192-bit memory bus.
RTX 4060 has 272.0 GB/s memory bandwidth compared to RTX 3060's 360.0 GB/s.
RTX 4060 is 17% faster than RTX 3060 at 1080p resolution.
RTX 3060 is 3% faster than RTX 4060 at 1440p resolution.
RTX 3060 is 11% faster than RTX 4060 at 4K resolution.
RTX 4060 has 29% lower cost per frame than RTX 3060 at 1080p.
RTX 4060 has 47.8% lower power consumption than RTX 3060.
RTX 3060 has 50% more maximum VRAM than RTX 4060.
The GeForce RTX 4060 is recommended as it beats the GeForce RTX 3060 in performance tests.
